title: Nature's Autumn Adventure
description: This is a resource pack created by NatureOfGaming alongside her community, its an aesthetic pack that doesn't change too much of the core game!
body:
This is an Aesthetic based Resource pack themed around the season of Autumn! This pack is meant to change the overall aura of the game to a cozier, fall feel whilst not changing the base textures so you can use this pack with your friends! 

This pack only changes some things that I count as "Aesthetic", so the leaves and the grass has changed to an Autumnal theme, there's some Fall themed food items as well!|

![A Forest Scene](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/394280e3652822c5044b1edf7d456082401038b6.png)![The Taiga Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d45d8dce78b216dabb3a7b23dc2d98e51482d8cd.png)
